texto: I inhaled the musty, leathery, old-papery scent and a shiver passed over me. If I had any idea of heaven, it was this: shelves and shelves of books, ten times as many as were upstairs, each with stories or pictures more exciting and beautiful than the next, and two overstuffed chairs big enough for me to sleep in.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Clay Carmichael sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “I inhaled the musty, leathery, old-papery scent and a shiver passed over me. If I had any idea of…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, books, reading, útil em momentos de reading e shelves.
